---
title: ""
page-layout: article
toc: false
listing:
  - id: recent-writing
    contents: "writing/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: table
    max-items: 3
    fields: [date, title, description]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Date"
      title: "Title"
      description: "Summary"
  - id: recent-projects
    contents: "projects/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: table
    max-items: 3
    fields: [date, title, description]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Date"
      title: "Title"
      description: "Summary"
---

::: {.hero}
# Jasper Cain

::: {.subtitle}
Writing about technology, ideas, and the projects I'm building.
:::
:::

## Recent Writing {.section-heading}

:::{#recent-writing}
:::

[View all writing →](writing/index.qmd)

---

## Recent Projects {.section-heading}

:::{#recent-projects}
:::

[View all projects →](projects/index.qmd)
